arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund 'offered' transfer lifeline amid Man United criticism and Ruben Amorim comments
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund hasn't scored for Manchester United in 16 games with his last goal coming in December

arts.ttl: 6 stars Man Utd could lose MILLIONS on as rivals take advantage of crisis
arts.sum: Manchester United owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe is attempting to slash costs across the board at Old Trafford and rival clubs are attempting to take advantage of the Red Devils’ precarious financial situation

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Manager Ruben Amorim 'urging' club hierarchy to sign Sporting Lisbon star
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim is reportedly urging the club to provide the money needed to reunite him with Sporting Lisbon youngster Geovany Quenda.

arts.ttl: Victor Osimhen BOMBSHELL: Man Utd swap deal is 'complicated'
arts.sum: Napoli are reportedly interested in signing Manchester United forward Rasmus Hojlund, although a swap deal involving Victor Osimhen has been described as “complicated.” Hojlund has struggled since his €73.9 million move to Old Trafford in 2023 and Ruben Amorim is eager to sign an adequate replacement during the upcoming summer transfer window in a bid to improve Man Utd’s fortunes.

arts.ttl: Manchester United could soon unleash exciting youngster who is perfect for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Ayden Heaven has been involved in recent Manchester United squads and his debut could come sooner rather than later

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos rivalling Man United for signature of £62m-rated centre-back?
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly interested in signing Everton defender Jarrad Branthwaite this summer, rivalling Manchester United for his signature.

arts.ttl: Amid more Man United job cuts, Amorim points finger at soccer failings
arts.sum: Ahead of another round of job cuts at Manchester United, head coach Ruben Amorim said his underperforming team must take its share of the blame for the club’s financial woes. In a letter to supporters last month, United said its losses of more than 300 million pounds ($375 million) over the past three years were unsustainable and it was in danger of breaching the Premier League’s financial rules.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Ipswich - Premier League
arts.sum: How Man Utd could line up for their Premier League clash with Ipswich on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: 'An opportunity' - Kieran McKenna makes Manchester United admission ahead of Ipswich fixture
arts.sum: Ipswich Town will be hoping to capitalise on Man United's Old Trafford struggles when they meet on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Axel Tuanzebe SNUBS Wayne Rooney as he names 34-year-old World Cup winner as his best ever Man United team-mate
arts.sum: Axel Tuanzebe emerged through Man United's youth academy before going on to make his debut for the club in 2017 and went on to work with a whole host of superstar players.
